Name: ROIC
Expression: TM1IGNORE_BADTUPLES {[DFS.D.KPI].[DFS.D.KPI].[EBIT],[DFS.D.KPI].[DFS.D.KPI].[NOPAT + Equity Pick Up],[DFS.D.KPI].[DFS.D.KPI].[Income Tax Theoretical],[DFS.D.KPI].[DFS.D.KPI].[(+) Gross Fixed Assets],[DFS.D.KPI].[DFS.D.KPI].[(-) Accumulated Depreciation],[DFS.D.KPI].[DFS.D.KPI].[(+) Adjustment Hyperinflation],[DFS.D.KPI].[DFS.D.KPI].[(+) Inflation adjustment],[DFS.D.KPI].[DFS.D.KPI].[(+) Right of Use],[DFS.D.KPI].[DFS.D.KPI].[(+) Investments],[DFS.D.KPI].[DFS.D.KPI].[(+) Goodwill],[DFS.D.KPI].[DFS.D.KPI].[(+) Intangible],EXCEPT(TM1FILTERBYPATTERN(DRILLDOWNMEMBER([DFS.D.KPI].[DFS.D.KPI].LEVELS(0).MEMBERS , {[DFS.D.KPI].[DFS.D.KPI].[Assets]} , RECURSIVE) , "*capital*" , "MEMBER_NAME") , {[DFS.D.KPI].[DFS.D.KPI].[Working Capital Balance]}),[DFS.D.KPI].[DFS.D.KPI].[% ROIC]}
